label: batched_decode_reuse
notes: Batched MPS decode across compatible pages. Captured during implementation.

label: batched_prepare_exact_decode
notes: Preparation batching and compact metadata upload after warmup.

label: session_baseline
notes: First session-shaped runtime benchmark with separate preload, append, and decode phases.

label: sink_recent_window
notes: Naive sink + recent execution window. Very fast, very lossy.

label: relevance_topk_mean
notes: Old-page shortlist by page-mean relevance.

label: approximate_old_pages
notes: Summary-based fallback for pruned old pages. Latency cost was high and quality did not improve.

label: relevance_sketch_1
notes: Single-vector page sketch baseline on the current branch.

label: relevance_sketch_4
notes: Four-vector page sketches reduce the bluntness of the gate versus a single page mean.

label: current_exact_session
notes: Current exact session baseline after sketch machinery landed. Preload and append are now dominated by sketch generation overhead.

label: exact_session_with_encoded_runtime_sketches
notes: Runtime page sketches precomputed during encode, removing sketch-generation overhead from session preload/append.

label: relevance_sketch_4_with_encoded_runtime_sketches
notes: Sketch-gated session after moving sketch computation to encode time. Runtime cost is now dominated by exact shortlisted decode instead of summary generation.

label: relevance_sketch_8_exact_refine_4
notes: Two-stage shortlist: sketch gate larger old-page pool, then exact compressed-domain refine before final exact decode.

label: relevance_sketch_8_exact_refine_4_reuse
notes: Two-stage shortlist with batched candidate scoring and reuse of shortlisted exact logits during final decode.

label: relevance_envelope_4
notes: Per-page min/max envelope relevance score. Better shortlist quality than sketch gating at a similar latency budget.

label: relevance_envelope_8_exact_refine_4
notes: Envelope shortlist followed by exact refine. Accuracy barely changes versus envelope-only, but latency climbs back toward the exact path.

label: envelope_sweep_4k_targeted
notes: Targeted envelope sweep around the promising 256/1024 region. Recommended approximate profile is sink=256, recent=1024, top_k=4; top_k=2 is the faster frontier point.

label: envelope_profile_long_context_validation
notes: Validated the tuned 256/1024/4 envelope profile at 8k and 16k. Latency stayed nearly flat, but quality degraded enough that long contexts need retuning.

label: envelope_auto_profile_validation
notes: First context-aware envelope heuristic. It is workable, but not yet a clear improvement over the simpler fixed 256/1024/4 profile.

label: envelope_tuner_8k_16k
notes: Budgeted long-context tuner over envelope candidates. Useful for choosing 8k/16k fast vs balanced points without relying on the weaker autoscaling heuristic.

label: llama random cpu
notes: Phase 5 tiny-random Llama generation harness on cpu_ref.

label: llama random mps
notes: Phase 5 tiny-random Llama generation harness on torch_mps.

label: llama tinyllama mps
notes: Phase 5 real TinyLlama benchmark on torch_mps with a short decode run.

label: llama smollm2_360m mps exact_2048_grouped_decode
notes: SmolLM2 360M exact-2048 comparison after batching exact MPS decode across KV-head groups within each layer. This moved DotCache decode ahead of the dense baseline on the recorded rerun while keeping the same KV-memory reduction and greedy agreement.

label: llama smollm2_360m mps exact_2048_skip_runtime_metadata
notes: SmolLM2 360M exact-2048 comparison after skipping approximate-only runtime page metadata during exact model-path page encoding. Prefill-cache ingest improved further while keeping DotCache ahead of dense on decode in this rerun.

label: llama smollm2_360m mps exact_2048_bounded_prepare_batches
notes: SmolLM2 360M exact-2048 comparison after capping MPS page-prepare batches to reduce giant prewarm upload waves. This materially reduced prefill-cache ingest and produced the strongest higher-context decode result so far on this M4.

label: llama smollm2_360m mps frontier_exact_lengths
